basic_details.short_information: Regional Ayurveda Research Institute (RARI) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website ccras.nic.in. Has been announced through the RARI Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years (as on 01-06-2026) Age relaxation will be provided as per Central Government rules for SC/ST/OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation in Ayurveda, Graduation in Ayurveda with 2 years additional experience
qualification.details: Post-Graduation in Ayurveda or Graduation in Ayurveda with additional 2 years experience.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the RARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the RARI recruitment is Consultant (Ayurveda).

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (Ayurveda) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 60,000/- per month (Consolidated).

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates should have Post-Graduation in Ayurveda or Graduation in Ayurveda with an additional 2 years of experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 45 years as of 01-06-2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q7. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 23-05-2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview venue is Regional Ayurveda Research Institute, Jammu, Jammu and Kashmir, 181123.
